page_content:
HLSA727 Causal Inference in Health Services Research (3 Credits)

An overview of the conceptual and empirical tools used to infer causation in health and health care research. Advantages and limitations of experimental and quasi-experimental designs in health services research are discussed and students gain experience through applied exercises. Prerequisite: HLSA725 or permission of instructor.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
